mapper.sql: id, name, description, price, stock, category, image_url, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM products
AND ( LOWER(name) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(category) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(description) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' )
ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT products_seq.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO products (id, name, description, price, stock, category, image_url, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{category}, #{imageUrl}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, stock = #{stock}, category = #{category}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
